Machine-readable matrix: [plot3_preregistered_criteria_matrix.csv](../data/derived/effect_inflation_dataset/plot3_preregistered_criteria_matrix.csv)

These counts separate discovery from admission. `Extractable D/N rows` means the project has local numeric D/N rows somewhere for that source; `Currently included` means those rows also survive the analytic-preregistration, non-retraction, independence/deduplication, and current-layer policy gates. Under the relaxed rule, a source may expose multiple planned preregistered results per paper/project, but the plotted layer uses a median collapse when that within-paper result set is explicit.

Across the currently named Plot 3 source families, `197,795` / `217,823` considered rows already have local D/N encoding somewhere in the project, and `296` rows enter the preregistered-results plot after the gates are applied.

Source-table column criteria:

::: {.dataset-table .dataset-criteria-table .source-column-criteria-table}

| Column | Criterion used |
| --- | --- |
| Corpus considered | One source family or deliberately tracked comparator family audited for Plot 3 admission. |
| What it is / why possible candidate | Brief source identity plus the concrete reason we thought it might contain preregistered confirmatory D/N rows. |
| Confirmed fields | Only fields verified locally or documented in the current audit: row counts, preregistration/registration status, D/N availability, support-status availability, and key caveats. |
| Why in/out | Final current gate call: included, excluded by analytic-preregistration, excluded by retraction, excluded as duplicate/nested evidence, or blocked by missing local row table. The focal-selector gate is now a planned-result gate plus median collapse, not a single-main-result-only gate. |
| # obs in | Number of result rows from that source family entering `plot3_preregistered_results.csv` and therefore the plotted figure. |

:::

::: {.dataset-table .dataset-criteria-table}

| Source family | Rows considered | Preregistered-confirmatory equivalent | Public local backing | Extractable D/N rows | Non-retracted source | Currently included |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| van den Akker matched-result medians [@vanDenAkkerSelectiveHypothesis2023] | 193 | 193 | 193 | 126 | 193 | 125 |
| Schäfer/Schwarz preregistered psychology articles [@schaefer2019meaningfulness] | 93 | 93 | 93 | 89 | 93 | 89 |
| SCORE/COS preregistration-indicated papers [@tyner2026] | 245 | 245 | 245 | 34 | 245 | 34 |
| RPCB Registered Report replication effects [@errington2021] | 188 | 188 | 188 | 159 | 188 | 23 |
| Registered Reports preregistered-hypotheses corpus [@scheel2021] | 71 | 71 | 71 | 32 | 71 | 16 |
| PSA-CR002 cognitive reappraisal hypotheses [@wang2021psacr002] | 12 | 12 | 12 | 12 | 12 | 1 |
| PSA-CR001 pooled preregistered rows [@dorison2022] | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 1 |
| EGAP Metaketa I pooled PAP row [@metaketaIRepo] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| EGAP Metaketa III pooled PAP row [@metaketaIIIProject] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| EGAP Metaketa IV pooled PAP row [@metaketaIVProject] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| ManyBabies 1 bilingual IDS pooled row [@byersHeinlein2021manybabiesBilingual] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| ManyBabies 1 IDS pooled row [@manyBabies2020Ids] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| ManyClasses 1 feedback pooled row [@fyfe2021manyclasses1] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| PSA004 true-belief/Gettier pooled row [@hall2024psa004Turri] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| ClinicalTrials.gov API registered outcome-result universe [@du2024] | 190,836 | 17,726 | 190,836 | 190,836 | 190,836 | 0 |
| Brodeur preregistered/PAP table tests [@brodeur2020] | 10,071 | 3,724 | 10,071 | 3,724 | 10,071 | 0 |
| FORRT FReD / Replication Database | 843 | 0 | 843 | 843 | 843 | 0 |
| Schäfer/Schwarz non-preregistered comparator [@schaefer2019meaningfulness] | 900 | 0 | 900 | 682 | 900 | 0 |
| FReD archived workflow rescue queue | 343 | 0 | 343 | 343 | 343 | 0 |
| CliniFact published trial primary-outcome rows [@zhang2025clinifact] | 339 | 0 | 339 | 339 | 339 | 0 |
| Linden focal/random psychology sample [@linden2024publicationBiasPsychology] | 316 | 0 | 316 | 316 | 316 | 0 |
| PSA replication-pair rows | 93 | 93 | 93 | 93 | 93 | 0 |
| Many Labs 1-5 project-level replication rows | 69 | 69 | 69 | 69 | 69 | 0 |
| Registered Replication Reports Plot 1 pair rows | 49 | 49 | 49 | 49 | 49 | 0 |
| Communication privacy preregistered corpus [@masur2025privacy] | 31 | 31 | 31 | 31 | 31 | 0 |
| High-Replicability Research project [@protzko2024highrep] | 48 | 48 | 3 | 3 | 0 | 0 |
| Retrieval-extinction rats preregistered replication [@luyten2017retrievalExtinction] | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 0 |
| Transparent Psi Project / Bem row [@kekecs2023tpp] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 0 |
| Nordic trial registration-publication linkage | 7,461 | 0 | 7,461 | 0 | 7,461 | 0 |
| AACT x PubMed registered primary outcomes [@du2024] | 2,720 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 2,720 | 0 |
| COMPare prespecified outcome audit | 1,171 | 749 | 1,171 | 0 | 1,171 | 0 |
| TESS survey-experiment archive [@tessPastStudiesArchive] | 517 | 517 | 517 | 0 | 517 | 0 |
| van den Akker selective-hypothesis-reporting corpus [@vanDenAkkerSelectiveHypothesis2023] | 459 | 459 | 446 | 0 | 459 | 0 |
| Twomey kinesiology article audit | 300 | 27 | 300 | 0 | 300 | 0 |
| Registered Replication Reports per-lab rows | 205 | 205 | 0 | 0 | 205 | 0 |
| Allen/Mehler RR support-rate review [@allenMehler2019OpenScience] | 113 | 113 | 113 | 0 | 113 | 0 |
| EGAP Metaketa IV native rows [@metaketaIVProject] | 36 | 36 | 36 | 0 | 36 | 0 |
| EGAP Metaketa III native rows [@metaketaIIIProject] | 30 | 30 | 30 | 0 | 30 | 0 |
| ManyClasses 2 classroom materials [@manyClasses2Osf] | 30 | 30 | 30 | 0 | 30 | 0 |
| ManyBabies 3 registered-report materials [@manyBabies3Osf] | 15 | 15 | 0 | 0 | 15 | 0 |
| ManyBabies 2 native model-coefficient materials [@manyBabies2AnalysisRepo] | 4 | 4 | 4 | 0 | 4 | 0 |
| Self-control fMRI preregistered materials | 4 | 4 | 0 | 0 | 4 | 0 |
| EGAP Metaketa I native ATE rows [@metaketaIRepo] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 0 | 1 | 0 |
| ERN/Pe RRR OpenNeuro/OSF hubs [@ernPeRrrOpenNeuro] | 1 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 1 | 0 |
| ManyBabies 4 helpers/hinderers RR materials [@manyBabies4Project] | 1 | 1 | 1 | 0 | 1 | 0 |

:::

For Plot 3, the real bottleneck is not discovery. It is converting conceptually relevant preregistered-like sources into local auditable source tables that survive the non-retraction and analytic-preregistration gates.
